content.situation: 员工发现电脑无法连接网络，向IT支持求助
content.speakerText: Hi, I can't get online at all. The Wi-Fi icon is grayed out.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我完全上不了网，Wi-Fi图标是灰色的。

blanks.answer: Have you tried restarting the router
options: Have you tried restarting the router
Did you call the internet company
Should I bring a new cable

content.hint: 先询问对方是否尝试过基础排查步骤，体现专业支持流程

content.situation: 员工的打印机突然停止工作，需要IT协助
content.speakerText: The printer isn't responding. It shows 'Offline' on my screen.
content.speakerTextCn: 打印机没反应，我的屏幕上显示‘离线’。
content.responseTemplate: Got it. ___ first before I send someone over?

blanks.answer: Can you check if it's turned on and connected
options: Can you check if it's turned on and connected
Are you using the right paper size
Should I replace the ink cartridges

content.hint: 在安排人员前，先引导用户确认基本状态，避免无效上门
content.knowledgePoint: 优先确认设备基础状态的表达

content.situation: 员工的电脑运行缓慢，频繁弹出错误提示，联系IT支持
content.speakerText: My computer is super slow and keeps popping up error messages.
content.speakerTextCn: 我的电脑特别卡，还不断弹出错误提示。
content.responseTemplate: Understood. ___ before we schedule a deeper check?

options: Did you install new software last week
Are you using a USB drive

content.hint: 重启是解决性能问题的第一步，应优先询问
content.knowledgePoint: 基础故障处理的优先级表达
